headline: Raymond James Maintains Strong Buy on Travelers Companies, Raises Price Target to $400
summary: Raymond James  analyst C. Gregory Peters   maintains Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) with a Strong Buy and raises the price target from $350 to $400.

headline: Travelers Publishes Its 2025 Sustainability Report
summary: HARTFORD, Conn., July 06, 2026--The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) today announced the release of its 2025 Sustainability Report, which details the company’s approach to long-term value creation.
